description: Agent roles for CivForge. In-game agents (harper, sebastian, etc.) are simulation personas. Execution lanes: Grok swarm (grok.com planning), Cursor (local executor), OpenClaw (wt escalation). See docs/EXECUTION_LANE_V2.md.

roles.name: Grok Swarm (grok.com planner)
roles.description: Cloud swarm on grok.com. Authors WP-* criteria and PRIME planning receipts. Does not execute on Mac Studio. Closes against Cursor execution receipts.

roles.name: Cursor (local executor)
roles.description: All CivForge local work: code, kernel :8080, poller, validate-game, commits to CivForge main.

roles.name: Harper (Agentic Systems & Memory)
roles.description: In-game AgentBrain persona. Drives research/verify in governance cycles.

roles.name: Sebastian (Governance & Safety)
roles.description: In-game FunForge/gate persona. Enforces quality in simulation.

roles.name: GameMechanicDesigner
roles.description: Grok swarm lane specialist for mechanics work packs. Cursor implements.

roles.name: PlayerAgent
roles.description: External agents play via MCP/CLI against :8080.

roles.name: UICoordinator
roles.description: Dashboard landed — extend only, no rebuild.

roles.name: InfraGovernor
roles.description: Infra work packs. Cursor executes; OpenClaw for wt cron sustainment.

notes: Local Grok terminal removed 2026-06-15. No .grok/config.toml in CivForge. Update with docs/EXECUTION_LANE_V2.md.
